StudyLog.title: Study Log
StudyLog.description: A log entry for a user's interaction with a study lesson.

userId.description: The UID of the user who performed the action.

lessonTitle.description: The title of the lesson being studied.

data.description: The specific data for the interaction (e.g., question/answer, quiz score).

/study_logs/{logId}.description: Collection of all study interactions across the platform.
